app.title: Transcribe.cpp
app.author: sebjones
app.description: a C++ library for transcribing audio files with Google Cloud Speech-to-Text
proposed_tests: Install Transcribe.cpp and transcribe a sample audio file
Check Transcribe.cpp's API support for custom transcription
Transcribe a 10-minute audio file and measure accuracy
Compare Transcribe.cpp's performance with other ASR libraries
